zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy於大約1180年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Raynulph d'Arundel21歲，母親Margaret d'Everard21歲。他和Margaret de Lanherne至少有5個兒子。他去世於1280年12月15日在他的家鄉享年101歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy于大约1180年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Raynulph d'Arundel21岁，母亲Margaret d'Everard21岁。他和Margaret de Lanherne至少有5个儿子。他去世于1280年12月15日在他的家乡享年101岁。

nameMeanings.name: Arundel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

variants.name: Arrindell
meanings: West Indian (Dutch Caribbean and the Dominican Republic): probably an altered form of English   Arundel  .

nameMeanings.name: Renfred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Renfrewshire and Lanarkshire): habitational name from Renfrew (Renfrewshire), named with a British term cognate with Welsh rhynfrwd ‘point of current’.

variants.name: Renfro
meanings: English (Devon): from the Middle English personal name Reinfrid (ancient Germanic Ragin-, Raganfrid from ragin ‘counsel, decision’ + frid ‘peace’). This surname is now rare in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy was born about 1180, in Cornwall, England, his father, Raynulph d'Arundel, was 21 and his mother, Margaret d'Everard, was 21. He had at least 5 sons with Margaret de Lanherne. He died on 15 December 1280, in his hometown, at the age of 101.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy est né environ 1180, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Raynulph d'Arundel, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret d'Everard, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils avec Margaret de Lanherne. Il est décédé le 15 décembre 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 101 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy um 1180 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raynulph d'Arundel 21 und seine Mutter Margaret d'Everard 21. Er hatte mit Margaret de Lanherne mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb am 15. Dezember 1280 im Alter von 101 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy è nato il circa 1180 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Raynulph d'Arundel, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret d'Everard, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli con Margaret de Lanherne. Morì il 15 dicembre 1280, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 101 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloyが約1180年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Raynulph d'Arundelは21歳，母Margaret d'Everardは21歳であった。彼はMargaret de Lanherneとの間に少なくとも5人の息子をもうけた。彼は1280年12月15日に故郷で101歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy(이)가 대략 1180년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raynulph d'Arundel(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret d'Everard(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Margaret de Lanherne(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1280년 12월 15일 그의 고향에서 101세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Raynulph d'Arundel, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret d'Everard, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos com Margaret de Lanherne. Ele faleceu em 15 de dezembro de 1280, em sua cidade natal, com 101 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy родился около 1180 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Raynulph d'Arundel было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret d'Everard, 21. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей от Margaret de Lanherne. Он умер 15 декабря 1280 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 101 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Renfred Arundel of Treloy nació aproximadamente 1180, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Raynulph d'Arundel, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret d'Everard, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos con Margaret de Lanherne. Murió el 15 de diciembre de 1280, en su pueblo, a la edad de 101 años.
